name: golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev
title: golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev
summary: Remote Procedure Call libraries for golang
description:
Remote Procedure Call libraries for golang
This project relates to CDE 1.1: Remote Procedure Call
(http://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/9629399/)
.
It is a partial implementation that mainly focuses on unmarshaling NDR
encoded byte streams into Go structures.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev because Remote Procedure Call libraries for golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jcmturner-rpc.v2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
